message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant "Server" as Server
rectangle "Backend Environment" {
    participant SuperHeroApi #99CCFF
    
}

User ->> Server : GET /search?q=<queryValue>\nalt [user search] 
activate Server  
note right of Server  \nbinarySearch(query)   
end note    
ref over Server\ngetFromCache(query)?\n end ref 

 alt has in cache     
   return queryValue      
else not has in cache request to API       
     activate SuperHeroApi        
      Server->SuperHeroAPI:GET Query Value         
       superHerpapi-->server:return value          
        deactivate SuperheroApI           
         updatecache(value)            
          server --> user:value              
           else                 
            stop             
endif


@enduml
